title: Fake Hot Wheels
summary: Hot Wheels has been a popular diecast manufacture for many decades. Unfortunately, a lot of knock offs have been made. Whether it is a terrible error, or the use of similar Hot Wheels castings in different manufacturer brand, or if it is a toy that uses a familiar flame logo on the blister, it must be shared for all to laugh.

title: List of 2026 Hot Wheels (by Series)

title: Hot Wheels Monster Trucks Oversized
summary: right|200pxHot Wheels Monster Trucks Oversized is a sub series of Hot Wheels Monster Trucks first launched in 2018. This line features 1/24 scale versions of various Monster Truck models; they feature a special package design which can be used as a display case. The series gained its current name in 2021; prior to then, the series was simply known as Monster Trucks 1:24 Scale Trucks.

title: Micro Hot Wheels
summary: Micro Hot Wheels is a series of miniature Hot Wheel cars that came out in 1989 to compete with the newest phenomenon of diecast toys "Micro Machines".
